envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Workflows at Stage 1 (Template-only) and Stage 2 (Recommendation-only) cannot execute. Workflow recommendations are advisory.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Team tier introduces Stage 2 surfacing for IC + manager workflows. Slack-bound recommendations are LANDABLE via the C2 OPERATING substrate.

items.name: Onboarding Checklist (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: Admin Twin surfaces this template to admins onboarding new team members.
items.model_usage_notes: Stage 2 recommendation; admin policy approval governs scope of surfacing.
items.recommendation_purpose: Help admin onboard new team members consistently.
items.safe_fallback: Admin walks the OOTB onboarding template manually.
DMW_scope_implications: Admin scope only; no employee scope read
governance_review_points: Stage 3 promotion requires explicit Founder authorization

items.name: Tomorrow's Executive Brief (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: Twin surfaces a daily-brief recommendation to EA + executive seats per Wave 2.1 §22 aha moments.
items.model_usage_notes: Stage 2 surfacing; relies on calendar + email metadata only at Team tier; no payload persistence (Slack reads at C2 OPERATING).
items.recommendation_purpose: Surface EA daily-brief structure as first-week aha moment.
items.safe_fallback: EA assembles brief manually using OOTB template.
DMW_scope_implications: Executive scope read only; no managerial-oversight monitoring of EA
governance_review_points: Stage 3 promotion requires named EA + executive consent + admin policy approval

items.name: Sprint Risk Summary (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: PM Twin surfaces sprint risk summaries weekly. Stage 2 recommendation-only.
items.model_usage_notes: Requires Project Tracker connector (C4-A Jira or C4-B Linear) for execution at Stage 3+. Stage 2 operates from manual input.
items.recommendation_purpose: Surface team-level sprint risk to PM + Eng Manager (team-scoped, never engineer-scoring).
items.safe_fallback: PM assembles risk summary from sprint board manually.
DMW_scope_implications: Team scope; never engineer-level scoring per Wave 2.1 §14
governance_review_points: No engineer scoring or psychological inference

items.name: Weekly Execution Review (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: Twin surfaces a recurring weekly execution review structure for managers + team leads.
items.recommendation_purpose: Surface a standard team retrospective + plan structure to team leads.
items.safe_fallback: Team lead runs the review using the OOTB template.
DMW_scope_implications: Team-scope only; no individual-level performance inference
governance_review_points: Workforce metrics are advisory, not punitive

items.name: Travel Booking + Expense Shell (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: EA-canonical Wave 2.1 §22 aha moment — Twin surfaces draft travel itinerary + expense shell for executive trips.
items.model_usage_notes: Wave 2.1 deepest worked example. Stage 2 recommendation-only; Stage 3 proposed-action requires Travel + Expense connector readiness + dual-control approval.
items.recommendation_purpose: First-week EA aha moment per Wave 2.1 §22.
tool_dependencies: SAP Concur or equivalent when activated
items.safe_fallback: EA books travel manually using existing tools.
DMW_scope_implications: Executive-scoped travel + expense shell; never executive financial data exposure to other Twins
governance_review_points: Stage 3 requires dual-control for executive-spend approval per ADR-0026

items.name: Offboarding Checklist (Stage 2)
items.human_readable_summary: Admin Twin surfaces offboarding checklist to admins. Preserves audit + DMW safety per RULE 10 + ADR-0002.
items.model_usage_notes: Stage 2 surfacing; audit chain integrity preserved through Stage 3+ promotion.
items.safe_fallback: Admin runs offboarding manually with audit preservation per ADR-0002.
DMW_scope_implications: Audit + DMW safety preserved through offboarding regardless of plan tier
